title: Inspiring Tagline
scenario: Create a 10-word tagline for a wellness center that emphasizes the importance of self-care and mindfulness. The tagline should be short, memorable, and convey a sense of calm.
constraints: Must convey a sense of calm

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated text is exactly 10 words and conveys a sense of calm.
Evaluate the uniqueness and creativity of the tagline.
Assess if the tagline evokes a sense of calm and well-being.
